programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Seeking refuge from a storm, traveler David Ellington comes upon a bizarre hermitage of monks, who have imprisoned a man who begs for his help. When David confronts the head monk Brother Jerome, he is told that the man is the devil, and David must decide

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young woman lying in a hospital bed, her head wrapped in bandages, awaits the outcome of a surgical procedure performed by the State in a last-ditch attempt to make her look 'normal'.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities thought they could build a better future separately, but the recent loss of one of their own drives them to band together; new leaders rise when a disturbing and dangerous threat is unmasked; an escaped captive revisits his past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages; a search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years; while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an overwhelming loss, the communities must brave a ferocious blizzard; as one group deals with an enemy from within, another is forced to make a life or death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group in Oceanside continues to train in case the Whisperers return; tensions are high as the heroes struggle to hold onto their concept of civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A flashback reveals the origins of Alpha and Beta; Alpha attempts to toughen up Lydia as they prepare to walk with the dead; the Whisperers create their herds.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The threat of the Whisperers return leads to paranoia sweeping over Alexandria; in the meantime, Carol battles with the need for revenge.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Clark family find themselves in a terrible predicament.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: After a long journey, the Clark family arrive at their new home; Strand attempts to hold power over his domain.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia and Nick fall in with new crowds; Madison discovers Otto's past mimics her own.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious character searches for purpose and becomes tied to the struggle over an important resource in the apocalypse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo trata de reconducir a la horda de zombis para alejarla de Alexandria, pero el plan falla y Glenn y Nicholas terminan rodeados por muertos vivientes. Rick, por su parte, es atacado por los asaltantes que Morgan expulsó de Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan le explica a un asaltante al que mantiene cautivo cómo venció a la ira que le consumía y aprendió que el camino correcto es aquel que rechaza la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Alexandria, donde el ánimo está decaído por la presencia de la horda de zombis y las secuelas del asalto sufrido. Maggie y Aaron salen en busca de Glenn. Denise pierde la confianza en sí misma, pero Tara la anima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl se separa de Abraham y Sasha mientras regresan a Alexandria. Un trío de fugitivos captura a Daryl, aunque él trata de convencerlos de que se unan a su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn encuentra a Enid y la convence de regresar junto a él a Alexandria. Mientras, en la comunidad, Ron roba armas del arsenal y Carol se enfrenta a Morgan porque no confía en él.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La horda de zombis invade Alexandria a través de la grieta que se produjo en el muro. Rick, Michonne, Carl, Gabriel y Deanna se ocultan en la casa de Jessie, pero se dan cuenta de que están rodeados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ahora que los caminantes han traspasado las barreras de Alexandría, Rick y los otros sobrevivientes deben seguir luchando para mantenerse a salvo e intentar no perder la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo cree que estar en el lado de los vivos trae responsabilidades que van más allá de la supervivencia. Desde esta perspectiva, Rick comienza una lucha consigo mismo para preservar las huellas de lo que queda de humanidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick acompaña a Jesus a su comunidad, La Cumbre. Allí, un residente intenta matar a Gregory, el líder, por órdenes de Negan. Maggie hace un pacto con Gregory: matarán a Negan a cambio de la mitad de las provisiones que guardan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo enemigo amenaza la paz en Alexandria y Rick y el grupo deciden que la única manera de vencerlo es combatir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras haber obtenido un éxito menor, algunos de los miembros del grupo han sido hechos prisioneros por sus nuevos enemigos y el resto de los supervivientes de Alexandria tendrá que tratar de liberarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Abraham abandona a Eugene durante una misión porque él le dice que no necesita su protección. Daryl, Rosita y Denise se topan con un grupo de los Salvadores, dirigidos por Dwight, y entre los dos bandos se produce un tiroteo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol desaparece de Alexandria y toda la comunidad se coordina para localizarla. Sin embargo, lo que algunos de ellos encuentran no es lo que andaban buscando.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para salvar a Maggie, que se encuentra enferma, el grupo de Rick se aventura fuera de los muros de Alexandria. Pero los hombres de Negan los están esperando en la carretera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre contra quién ha ejecutado Negan su venganza. Después, lleva a Rick a hacer un viaje que este no olvidará jamás, con la intención de mostrarle hasta dónde llega su poder y cómo va a cambiar la vida de todos los protagonistas.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to protect South Seas island prince who insists on going to an exclusive health resort where assassins are waiting to kill him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West, probing the murder by fire of one of his former professors, Dr. Robey, a distinguished archaeologist, is ordered off the case at the request of U.S. Senator Hungerford.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Posing as a notorious hired gunman and a corrupt colonel, secret agents James T.West and Artemus Gordon infiltrate the forces of renegade-army leader Thorald Wolfe.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith's Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith's battle strategy to metalize his Red-Eyes Black Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey challenges Yugi for the right to face Pegasus. In a battle between friends, a fierce match ensues between the two people who know each other's strategies and cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is shocked as Joey uses the Time Wizard card on him. It's the very same card Yugi gave Joey as a sign of friendship!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi prepares for the ultimate battle against Pegasus with the souls of Grandpa, Kaiba, and Mokuba on the line.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie do iCarly from an apartment that is rumored to be haunted. When creepy things start happening, the friends worry that the ghost rumors just might be true.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam gets detention on the night of iCarly's 50th web show spectacular. Unable to do their normal webcast, Carly and Freddie do their best to get detention too so they can do the show from inside detention with Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie are invited to Daka headquarters where they are offered a large sum of money to endorse Daka's new shoe, the Tech-Foot, on iCarly. But the shoes turn out to be terrible.

programme.desc: Carly gets a B on a History paper she should have gotten an A on. Sam, seeing an opportunity during her weekly meeting with Principal Franklin, changes Carly's grade in the computer and surprises her with the straight A's.

programme.desc: Sam and Cat are hired to accompany two obnoxious children on a flight to the Bahamas.

programme.desc: Nora targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam; Sam and Cat are forced to ask Nevel for help.

programme.desc: While helping Goomer with a bully at his gym, Sam knocks out an MMA champion.

programme.desc: Sam and Cat try to avoid getting in trouble when they accidentally knock out musician Del DeVille.

programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!
